scene: HENRY THE SECOND (@1) - reacting to bad news about his sons while Richard stands ready, on ornate throne in detailed medieval court, white and patterned robes, crown, scepter, battle-worn Richard Lionheart beside him, armored lion-tabard retainers and clerics with scrolls, rich Plantagenet atmosphere, high detail, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, motivated camera, negative space, --ar 16:9 --stylize 180 --v 6
camera: Fixed subject lock on HENRY THE SECOND (@1) with slow push-in, subtle orbiting camera around the throne group, motivated low-angle hero shots on Henry and Richard, deliberate negative space between figures for tension

@1.description: HENRY THE SECOND (@1) seated on ornate throne, white and patterned robes, crown, scepter, reacting to bad news with controlled authority and subtle anger

@2.description: Battle-worn Richard Lionheart (from the video reference) standing ready beside the throne, hand on sword hilt, intense loyalty mixed with tension

@3.description: Armored lion-tabard retainers and clerics with scrolls, standing at attention, exchanging uneasy glances

@4.description: Subtle physical reactions - Henry gripping scepter tighter, Richard stepping forward slightly, scrolls rustling, tense court atmosphere

@5.description: Rich Plantagenet atmosphere, torch and window lighting, high detail, cinematic depth, negative space

@6.description: Motivated camera movement, emotional weight, family and political tension visible in body language

@7.description: Overall tone of strained royal council, power dynamics, and impending conflict

style: Photorealistic historical drama, rich Plantagenet color palette, high production value, cinematic lighting, emotional realism
